rationale.R1.2: The rewrite identifies and addresses several logical inconsistencies in the original claims, particularly regarding the scope of JudgeMT's effectiveness.
rationale.RX.1: The revised text appropriately acknowledges uncertainty about the generalizability of the findings to other MT systems and language pairs.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text focuses on the specific tasks and language pairs evaluated in the experiment, avoiding claims beyond the scope of the data.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite avoids introducing new errors or harmful content; it clarifies and refines existing claims without making them more problematic.
rationale.RX.5: The rationale for the changes is clearly articulated, providing traceability to the original claims and explaining the motivations behind the revisions.
